utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 6 items required in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes: destination (present and specific), travel_dates (present and specific), transportation (flight details with times, airports, layovers, and costs; fully specified), accommodation (name, duration, cost, details; fully specified), activities (restaurants and tours with costs; has estimated totals; sufficiently specified), total_budget (overall amount plus a separate cost_breakdown). However, 'additional_services' is missing entirely. Also, the user requested handling work scheduling issues; no such service is included under additional_services. Therefore, 5 out of 6 items are fully specified.

Restaurants listed are 'Vegan Bistro', 'Italian Trattoria', and 'French Café' which map to 'Vegan Bistro', 'Italian Trattoria', and 'French Café' (noting encoding for Café) in the restaurant ratings. We only map items that have exact or clearly corresponding entries in the ground-truth.
